Ntc Of Mtn For Assignment Of Rights Order
Off Calendar Nov-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights Order is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Discharged
